security_gate.reason: Security gate failed because Critical vulnerabilities were detected.
security_gate.policy: FAIL if one or more Critical findings exist.

top_blocking_findings.title: Hardcoded secret detected
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Move secrets to environment variables or a secure secret manager.

top_blocking_findings.title: Use of eval() detected
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Avoid eval(). Use safe parsing or explicit logic instead.

top_blocking_findings.title: Unsafe subprocess usage with shell=True
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Use shell=False and pass command arguments as a list.

top_blocking_findings.title: Possible raw SQL string formatting
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Use parameterized queries or an ORM query builder.

top_blocking_findings.title: Direct innerHTML assignment detected
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Use textContent or sanitize HTML before assigning it to the DOM.

top_blocking_findings.title: JavaScript eval() usage detected
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Avoid eval(). Use safe parsing or explicit logic instead.

top_blocking_findings.title: Possible hardcoded secret detected
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Move secrets to environment variables or a dedicated secret manager.

top_blocking_findings.title: Vulnerable dependency detected: lodash
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Review GHSA-35jh-r3h4-6jhm in OSV.dev and upgrade the affected dependency to a patched or currently supported version.

top_blocking_findings.title: Vulnerable dependency detected: lodash
top_blocking_findings.recommendation: Review GHSA-p6mc-m468-83gw in OSV.dev and upgrade the affected dependency to a patched or currently supported version.
